name: Corn Dog Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, salt, cornmeal, and sugar.
2. Stir in the bacon drippings.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, buttermilk, and baking soda until well combined.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just mixed.
5. Cut each frankfurter into 10 pieces.
6. Dip each frankfurter section into the batter, coating it completely. Use wooden picks to help with dipping.
7. Heat vegetable oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
8. Using an inverted funnel or piping bag, carefully drop the coated frankfurters into the hot oil.
9. Fry for 3-4 minutes, turning once, until golden brown and cooked through.
10. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
11. Insert party picks and serve immediately with desired condiments.
